title: Replacement Time Delay Switch Door Lock，Compatible for LG，Washing Machine EBF61315801 WC1365WH Parts
features: Dual safety locking: Mechanical latch + electronic sensing. When forcibly opening the door during operation, the power will be cut off to prevent accidents.
Low-temperature frost resistance: PTC heating element for defrosting, still able to open flexibly at -10℃.
Child lock protection: Locking panel + machine door, preventing children from accidentally turning on the machine or opening the door.
Strong suction force: Dual-stable electromagnetic mechanism, suction force ≥ 50N, ensuring the door is securely locked without loosening.
Intelligent detection: Automatically locks when water level / abnormal high temperature occurs, avoiding water leakage or burns.
